//Loc x y
0 0.0 0.0 "depot"
1 48.0 777.0 "product aisle 1 bloc 1 rank 28"
2 144.0 261.0 "product aisle 3 bloc 0 rank 17"
3 192.0 634.0 "product aisle 4 bloc 1 rank 5"
4 48.0 157.0 "product aisle 1 bloc 0 rank 2"

10 0.0 170.0 "product aisle 0 bloc 0 rank 4"

14 96.0 608.0 "product aisle 2 bloc 1 rank 2"
15 48.0 196.0 "product aisle 1 bloc 0 rank 8"
16 0.0 634.0 "product aisle 0 bloc 1 rank 6"
17 24.0 120.0 "intersection aisle 0 bloc 0 rank 0"
18 24.0 571.0 "intersection aisle 0 bloc 1 rank 1"
